Class HybridClass

java.lang.Object
logic.entity.Character
logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
All Implemented Interfaces:
Attackable, AttackAnimation, Damageable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Barista, Exorcist, Vampire
public abstract class HybridClass extends Character implements Attackable
Base class for hybrid characters that combine melee/ranged traits.

Uses attack buff as special skill and shared weapon animation progression.

  • Field Summary

      public HybridClass()

      Creates a hybrid character with custom stats.
      Parameters:
      hp - HP value
      atk - attack value
      def - defense value
      attackRange - range value
      attackSpeed - attack speed
